<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Introspect token"}
>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/introspect"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Check if an access or refresh token is active. Returns token metadata if active.

Requires client authentication via Bearer token (client_secret).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
